title: Getting one item less on the board
excerpt:
Hi, 
I am triggering create items on Monday board through external events. I am sending the trigger request to the monday webhook url at an interval of 3 seconds. I notice that I always get one item less. The first item/…

posts.author: LokeshSipani (Lokesh Sipani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I am triggering create items on Monday board through external events. I am sending the trigger request to the monday webhook url at an interval of 3 seconds. I notice that I always get one item less. The first item/request does not reach the monday board as seen in the Integrations Activity logs.
Although, when I change retrigger those requests after some time, I get the missing item on the board.
Can you please let me know what I might be missing here?

Thanks!

posts.author: TomFri (Tom Fridman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @LokeshSipani

Welcome to our community and thank you for asking.

You should be answered soon by one of the community members or the monday team.

In the meantime, have a wonderful week.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @LokeshSipani,

Would you be able to please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com so we can take a closer look into this?

Please add an explanation of the flow you are going through, the exact mutations you are using, a timestamp of the last time you had the issue (date, hour, minute, your location, board ID) and if you can, a screen recording showing the steps you are following and the result you are seeing.

Looking forward to hearing from you via email!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: LokeshSipani (Lokesh Sipani)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Matias,

I have sent a mail with the screen recording and flow to the mentioned email. I have included the logs in them.
Please let me know if you need anything else from my side.

Thanks!
Lokesh Sipani

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for that @LokeshSipani !!

We will reply there

Cheers,
Matias
